title: T-017 — Co-product / by-product allocation on wo_output.registered (§9.3, §11.3 V-FIN-WO-07)
prompt:
# T-017 — Co-product/by-product allocation handler

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §9.3 co-product/by-product allocation; §11.3 V-FIN-WO-07 (sum allocation_pct ≤ 100%, FG-*/WIP- code formats); §13.1 wo_output.registered handler.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action `allocateCoProductCosts(woId)` that reads `bom_co_products` from 03-TECHNICAL and `wo_outputs` from 08-PROD, then writes `output_attribution_item_id` + `allocated_cost` to `material_consumption_costs` rows for the WO. Validate V-FIN-WO-07: allocation_pct sum ≤ 100% (block); product code format matches FG-* for finished goods or WIP-<2letter>-<7digits> for WIP (warn).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/finance/work-order-costs/_actions/allocate-coproducts.ts`:
   - Read bom_co_products WHERE bom_id = wo.bom_id (cross-module from 03-TECHNICAL).
   - Read wo_outputs WHERE wo_id = $1 — sum by output_type.
   - Compute per §9.3:
     - `primary_qty = SUM(wo_outputs.qty_kg WHERE output_type='primary')`
     - `co_products_pct = SUM(bom_co_products.allocation_pct WHERE is_primary=false)`
     - V-FIN-WO-07 BLOCK if `co_products_pct > 100`.
     - `primary_allocated_cost = wo.total_cost_actual × (1 - co_products_pct/100)`
     - Per co-product: `co_product_cost = wo.total_cost_actual × bom.allocation_pct/100`
     - By-products (output_type='byproduct'): allocation_pct=0 (zero cost absorbed). P2 reserves recovery_value credit per `waste_categories.recovery_value_per_kg`.
   - INSERT `material_consumption_costs` 'attribution rows' OR UPDATE existing consume rows with output_attribution_item_id + allocated_cost (depends on schema choice — pick UPDATE existing per PRD §9.3 line 800-803 example).
   - V-FIN-WO-07 WARN: check item codes against `^FG-` or `^WIP-[A-Z]{2}-\d{7}$` regex; non-conforming codes emit a structured warn log + audit row tagged `code_format_drift`.
2. SECURITY DEFINER fn `app.allocate_coproducts(wo_id uuid)` callable from worker.
3. Audit row on every allocation (audit_events with action='wo_coproduct_alloc').

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/work-order-costs/_actions/allocate-coproducts.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0057_allocate_coproducts_fn.sql [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/allocate-coproducts.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given BOM with primary + co-product allocation_pct=20, when run and wo.total_cost_actual=1000, then primary=800 and co_product=200.
- Given bom_co_products sum allocation_pct=105, when run, then raises 'allocation_pct sum exceeds 100' (V-FIN-WO-07 BLOCK) and no UPDATE.
- Given by-product output_type='byproduct', when run, then allocated_cost=0.
- Given item code 'PROD-12345' (non-conforming), when run, then warn log + audit row 'code_format_drift', but allocation commits (warn). AND given action commits, when material_consumption_costs queried, then every row has output_attribution_item_id and SUM(allocated_cost) = wo.total_cost_actual.
_(AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: allocate-coproducts.test.ts seeds BOM + WO outputs + consume rows; asserts each AC scenario including rounding tolerance.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/allocate-coproducts.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not divide by zero — guard primary_qty=0 case (raise error or skip allocation).
- Do not allow allocation_pct sum > 100 — V-FIN-WO-07 is hard.
- Do not use floating-point arithmetic for the split — use NUMERIC(15,4) consistently.
- Do not skip the code-format warn log — multi-industry standardization §1.2 expects format compliance.
- Do not modify wo_outputs from this action — read-only consumer.
- Do not run outside a transaction.

pipeline_inputs.description: Co-product/by-product cost allocation per bom_co_products.allocation_pct on wo_output.registered; V-FIN-WO-07 enforcement (block sum>100% + warn on code format drift).
pipeline_inputs.details: Consumer of 03-TECHNICAL bom_co_products and 08-PROD wo_outputs. Writes output_attribution_item_id + allocated_cost to material_consumption_costs. NUMERIC(15,4) throughout. By-products get 0 cost in P1 (recovery_value credit deferred to P2 EPIC 10-K). [AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]
